title: Minecraft, Forever
description: A love letter to my favourite game.
body:
![The header image for Minecraft, Forever.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d1fdee468d097aaec4dc990c83010d8ad48e71d.png)

Minecraft is one of my favourite games of all time, and it shows. I've spent years of my life messing around with its creative mode, trying to get as far as I can in survival mode, and enjoying the presence of others in multiplayer, all because of my dedication and passion for the game.

Despite everything that Mojang and Microsoft have done, it still remains firmly as the game that I'm the most passionate about. A game that, even after I move out of my parents' house, I'll still keep cemented in my mind for years to come.

I created this modpack to show my appreciation and dedication for Minecraft. To expand on what made it beautiful, to polish the old pieces and revitalize them with new life. I want to give new players, or even returning players, that nostalgic kick in the pants that brings them to explore and to venture out into the wild, to create something beautiful.

I know you will. And I know I will, too.

# Heads Up!

Due to my lack of Fuck Ass Hardware, I am uncertain about the stability and compatibility that Minecraft, Forever has with old and broken computers. Please direct all questions, comments, and concerns to my Discord server found here: [https://discord.gg/8eWpTugsnE](https://discord.gg/8eWpTugsnE)

Thank you!

---

Version numbers are as follows:

X.Y.Z

X = Major additions or removals that will likely cause conflicts in old worlds

Y = Minor additions or removals that will likely not cause conflicts in old worlds

Z = Patch additions or removals that are likely only for bug fixes and updates
